Uses of Class
bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage

Packages that use DataStorage
Package
Description
bupt.ta.service
 

  • Uses of DataStorage in bupt.ta.service

    Methods in bupt.ta.service with parameters of type DataStorage
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
    InterviewBookingService.bookSlot(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String applicationId, String slotId)
    Books an interview slot for a TA application.
    AdminService.DashboardSummary
    AdminService.buildDashboardSummary(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Computes dashboard totals and workload-cap indicators.
    AdminService.MODetailReport
    AdminService.buildMODetailReport(DataStorage storage, String userId)
    Builds the admin read-only report for one module organiser.
    AdminService.MonitoringReport
    AdminService.buildMonitoringReport(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Builds anomaly and capacity alerts for the admin monitoring page.
    NotificationReminderService.ReminderPreview
    NotificationReminderService.buildPreview(DataStorage storage)
    Summarises unread in-app notifications and email readiness.
    List<InterviewBookingService.SlotSummary>
    InterviewBookingService.buildSlotSummaries(DataStorage storage, String jobId)
    Builds slot summaries including booked applicants for one job.
    AdminService.TADetailReport
    AdminService.buildTADetailReport(DataStorage storage, String userId)
    Builds the admin read-only report for one TA.
    AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
    AdminService.buildUserDirectoryReport(DataStorage storage, String roleFilter, String query)
    Builds a filterable user directory with per-role activity metrics.
    List<AdminService.WorkloadRow>
    AdminService.buildWorkloadRows(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Lists each TA's selected workload for the admin workload page.
    InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
    InterviewBookingService.cancelBooking(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String applicationId)
    Clears the booked interview slot from a TA application.
    InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
    InterviewBookingService.createSlot(DataStorage storage, String moId, String jobId, String startsAtRaw, String durationRaw, String location, String notes, String capacityRaw)
    Creates an interview slot for an MO-owned job posting.
    InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
    InterviewBookingService.deleteSlot(DataStorage storage, String moId, String jobId, String slotId)
    Deletes an interview slot that has no bookings.
    int
    AdminService.enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, String keepApplicationId, AdminSettings settings)
    Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.
    int
    AdminService.enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
    Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String note)
    Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyRejected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String moNotes)
    Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifySelected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
    static void
    StudentNotificationService.notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.
    void
    ApplicationTimelineService.record(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String actorUserId, String actorName, String actorRole, String eventType, String title, String detail, String fromStatus, String toStatus)
    Appends one timeline event for an application.
    void
    ApplicationTimelineService.recordStatusChange(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String actorUserId, String actorName, String actorRole, String fromStatus, String toStatus, String detail)
    Records a ApplicationTimelineService.TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED timeline event.
    EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult
    EmailOtpService.requestOtp(DataStorage storage, String email, String purpose, AdminSettings adminSettings)
    Generates an OTP, persists it, and sends it via email (HTML + text).
    NotificationReminderService.ReminderResult
    NotificationReminderService.sendUnreadReminders(DataStorage storage)
    Emails each user with unread site notifications a digest (when SMTP is configured).
    double
    AdminService.sumSelectedWorkloadHours(DataStorage storage, String applicantId)
    Sums estimated hours across a TA's SELECTED applications.
    EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult
    EmailOtpService.verifyOtp(DataStorage storage, String email, String purpose, String code)
    Verifies an OTP for an email and purpose.
    boolean
    AdminService.wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect(DataStorage storage, String applicantId, Job job, AdminSettings settings)
    Returns true when selecting this applicant for job would meet or exceed the admin workload cap.
